layer_1_session_manifest.description: Wrote 00_FORMAL_THEORY_COMPLETE.md — the ARGUMENT document. 14 sections: problem, claim, axioms, equation, ten factors, structural properties, asymmetries, seven forced conclusions, evidence, boundary, Prism Argument, Oxford Convergence, falsification test, three-layer reconciliation test. THIS IS REQUIRED READING BEFORE ANY FRAMEWORK WORK.
Cleaned six orphaned clipboard files from Canon folder.
Codex refactored D:\GitHub\Math-Translation-Layer from Obsidian plugin to standalone engine.
Architecture: pure TypeScript, parse-translate-render pipeline, dictionary-as-JSON (theophysics.json is machine-readable Canon).
CLI working, browser overlay working, 10/10 tests passing.
Key design: website shows TRANSLATION by default, raw math hidden behind toggle.
YouTube scraper confirmed working: 3,913 videos loaded to Postgres (192.168.1.177:2665, crawlab_data, youtube_apologetics).
Built transcript_puller.py — pulls YouTube auto-captions via youtube-transcript-api v1.2.4. 27 transcripts pulled (~23,600 avg chars). Needs 2-3 second delay for bulk runs (IP blocking).
TikTok recon data loaded fresh to Postgres.
Wrote Codex briefing at D:\BIL\CODEX_BRIEFING.md for wiring BIL to Postgres, SBERT, DeBERTa, preference learning.
PIL capture HTML and AHK hotkey already built. Needs Postgres integration and AI-HUB startup integration.
David hiring human reviewer for CorrectedEntropyKernel.lean via Lean Zulip. 5-10 hours, next rent cycle.
Analyzed 1hr43min Trinometry interview. Wilson's reductio on moral grounding is airtight against materialists.
Wilson demolishes (shows the void). David illuminates (shows the math). Complementary.
David's debate posture: "two more questions and they corner themselves." Q0 difference from Wilson.
Canon folder at NAS Desktop\Cannon\ is source of truth. Read 00_FORMAL_THEORY_COMPLETE.md first.
Ten factors: G M E S_eff T K R Q F C. S enters as S_eff, NOT raw S_prod. C is factor, chi is output.
theophysics.json in Math Translation Layer is machine-readable Canon.
Transcript puller needs rate limiting before bulk runs.
Comms worker needs rebuild — /channel endpoints returning 500.
